entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum affected by downy mildew

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that causes substantial losses in grain yield

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which is reduced by downy mildew infection

entities.name: DISEASE-FREE SEED
entities.description: Seed that is free from the pathogen, necessary for managing epidemics

entities.name: OOSPORES
entities.description: Resting spores of the pathogen that can be seed-carried or present in the field

entities.name: CULTIVAR ROTATION
entities.description: The practice of multiplying seed in rotation of selected cultivars to reduce host-specific pathogen populations

entities.name: METALAXYL
entities.description: A chemical treatment used to control infection by externally seed-carried oospores

entities.name: PRE SOWING IRRIGATION
entities.description: Irrigation performed before sowing to control the development of early epidemics

entities.name: ROGUING
entities.description: The practice of removing infected plants from the seedling to heading stage

entities.name: FAST SEEDLING GROWTH
entities.description: A trait that helps in producing seed free from internal mycelium

entities.name: INTERNAL MYCELIUM
entities.description: Fungal growth within the plant that can reach the seed from an infected plant
